sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ الطَّازَجَةِ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِلْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Konzumiranje svježeg povrća i voća veoma je važno za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Eating fresh vegetables and fruits is very important for the body.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَحْتَوِي عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ تُقَوِّي جِهَازَ الْمَنَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ono sadrži mnogo vitamina koji jačaju imuni sistem.
sentences.translationEn: They contain many vitamins that strengthen the immune system.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِتَنَاوُلِ وَجَبَاتٍ غِذَائِيَّةٍ مُتَوَازِنَةٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari savjetuju konzumiranje uravnoteženih obroka svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors advise eating balanced meals every day.

sentences.arabic: شُرْبُ الْمَاءِ بِكَمِّيَّةٍ كَافِيَةٍ يُسَاعِدُ فِي الْحِفَاظِ عَلَى الصِّحَّةِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pijenje dovoljne količine vode pomaže u očuvanju općeg zdravlja.
sentences.translationEn: Drinking enough water helps in maintaining general health.
